title: critoniopsis occidentalis
intro: Critoniopsis occidentalis is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family, native to the western coast of North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Critoniopsis occidentalis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Critoniopsis occidentalis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
